'''holagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrillated|fibrillated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrillated|fibrillated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| holagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:holagithi|holagithi]] || [[word:holagiji|holagiji]] || [[word:holagishi|holagishi]] || [[word:holagiki|holagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:holaguthuthu|holaguthuthu]] || [[word:holagujuju|holagujuju]] || [[word:holagushushu|holagushushu]] || [[word:holagukuku|holagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:holaguthu|holaguthu]] || [[word:holaguju|holaguju]] || [[word:holagushu|holagushu]] || [[word:holaguku|holaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:holagufthuf|holagufthuf]] || [[word:holagufjuf|holagufjuf]] || [[word:holagufshuf|holagufshuf]] || [[word:holagufkuf|holagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:holagethe|holagethe]] || [[word:holageje|holageje]] || [[word:holageshe|holageshe]] || [[word:holageke|holageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:holagothotho|holagothotho]] || [[word:holagojojo|holagojojo]] || [[word:holagoshosho|holagoshosho]] || [[word:holagokoko|holagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:holagotho|holagotho]] || [[word:holagojo|holagojo]] || [[word:holagosho|holagosho]] || [[word:holagoko|holagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:holagofthof|holagofthof]] || [[word:holagofjof|holagofjof]] || [[word:holagofshof|holagofshof]] || [[word:holagofkof|holagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:holagĂŻfthĂŻf|holagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfjĂŻf|holagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfshĂŻf|holagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfkĂŻf|holagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:holagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|holagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|holagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|holagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|holagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:holagĂŻfthĂŻf|holagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfjĂŻf|holagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfshĂŻf|holagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfkĂŻf|holagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:holagĂŻfthĂŻf|holagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfjĂŻf|holagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfshĂŻf|holagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:holagĂŻfkĂŻf|holagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:holagĂŠthĂŠ|holagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:holagĂŠjĂŠ|holagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:holagĂŠshĂŠ|holagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:holagĂŠkĂŠ|holagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:holagathatha|holagathatha]] || [[word:holagajaja|holagajaja]] || [[word:holagashasha|holagashasha]] || [[word:holagakaka|holagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:holagatha|holagatha]] || [[word:holagaja|holagaja]] || [[word:holagasha|holagasha]] || [[word:holagaka|holagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:holagafthaf|holagafthaf]] || [[word:holagafjaf|holagafjaf]] || [[word:holagafshaf|holagafshaf]] || [[word:holagafkaf|holagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:holagasha|holagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:holagshĂ«sha|holagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holagrosha|holagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holagmusha|holagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:holagyasha|holagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholagnkshĂ«sha|goholagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholagnkrosha|goholagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholagnkmusha|goholagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholagnkyasha|goholagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:holalagasha|holalagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holalagshĂ«sha|holalagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holalagrosha|holalagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holalagmusha|holalagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holalagyasha|holalagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholalagnkshĂ«sha|goholalagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholalagnkrosha|goholalagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholalagnkmusha|goholalagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholalagnkyasha|goholalagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:helĂŠgasha|helĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:helĂŠgshĂ«sha|helĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:helĂŠgrosha|helĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:helĂŠgmusha|helĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:helĂŠgyasha|helĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|gohelĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohelĂŠgnkrosha|gohelĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohelĂŠgnkmusha|gohelĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohelĂŠgnkyasha|gohelĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:holfagasha|holfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:holfagshĂ«sha|holfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:holfagrosha|holfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:holfagmusha|holfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:holfagyasha|holfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goholfagnkshĂ«sha|goholfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goholfagnkrosha|goholfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goholfagnkmusha|goholfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goholfagnkyasha|goholfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
